channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Georgia recovers from No. 3 Florida's comeback and defeat Gators 88-83 despite Richard's 30 points
item.description: ATHENS, Ga. (AP) — Georgia guard Blue Cain sank a go-ahead 3-pointer with 47 seconds remaining after No. 3 Florida took its first lead by scoring 13 unanswered points, and the Bulldogs beat the Gators 88-83 on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: CHARLES ODUM, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Patrick Mahomes' barber reveals story behind star quarterback's viral haircut
item.description: Patrick Mahomes' longtime barber told Fox News Digital about why the quarterback opted for such a different hairstyle and how it almost happened sooner.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Chelsea routs Southampton 4-0 on frustrating night for Cole Palmer. Brighton and Palace win
item.description: Chelsea wasn't so reliant on Cole Palmer this time. On a frustrating evening for the England star, his Chelsea teammates stepped up — as demanded by their manager — to share the goals in a 4-0 thrashing of last-place Southampton in the Premier League on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: STEVE DOUGLAS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bengals plan to make All-Pro receiver Ja'Marr Chase the NFL's highest-paid non-quarterback
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS (AP) — The Cincinnati Bengals plan to make All-Pro wide receiver Ja’Marr Chase the highest-paid non-quarterback in the NFL. “He is going to end up being the No. 1 paid non-quarterback in the league,” director of player personnel Duke Tobin said Tuesday at the NFL scouting combine.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Galatasaray and Fenerbahce in a spat over Jose Mourinho making allegedly racist comments
item.description: ISTANBUL (AP) — Galatasaray plans to start criminal proceedings against Jose Mourinho and file complaints with soccer's governing body after accusing the Fenerbahce coach of making racist comments after a Turkish league game.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Wizards finally hold a team under 100 points, the last NBA team to do so this season
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — It took 57 games for the Washington Wizards to hold a team under 100 points this season. Of course, Marcus Smart wasn't around for most of those. Smart and the Wizards held Brooklyn to 12 points in the fourth quarter of their 107-99 victory over the Nets on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: NOAH TRISTER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Eagles coach Nick Sirianni pushes back against proposal to ban the tush push
item.description: Philadelphia Eagles coach Nick Sirianni pushed back against the Green Bay Packers’ proposal to ban the tush push play his team has used so successfully in short-yardage situations, including during its victory over the Kansas City Chiefs in Super Bowl 59.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Chen and Kerrigan are added to cast of a figure skating event benefiting victims of DC plane crash
item.description: Nathan Chen, Nancy Kerrigan and Peggy Fleming are among a bevy of figure skaters added to the cast of a benefit event this weekend in Washington, D.C., for victims of the midair collision and crash outside Ronald Reagan International Airport.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: NFL scouting combine features plenty of debate over top players at multiple positions
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS (AP) — The hopes of many NFL teams will start taking shape this week as the league's annual scouting combine begins in Indianapolis. As usual, there will be plenty to debate. There doesn't appear to be a clear-cut No. 1 overall pick or a top quarterback yet.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL MAROT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bell takes only lead in OT to edge Hocevar, Larson in another thrilling NASCAR finish in Atlanta
item.description: Christopher Bell celebrated a drought-ending victory for himself and Joe Gibbs Racing after a dramatic comeback in Atlanta.
item.dc:creator: CHARLES ODUM, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Chicago Sky acquire 2-time All-Star Atkins from Washington Mystics for 2025 No. 3 pick
item.description: The Chicago Sky have traded their top pick in the upcoming WNBA draft for two-time All-Star guard Ariel Atkins from the Washington Mystics.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Hayton records first Utah hat trick in 5-3 loss to Kings
item.description: LOS ANGELES (ABC4 Sports) - Despite Barrett Hayton recording the first hat trick in Utah Hockey Club history, Drew Doughty had a goal and two assists in the Los Angeles Kings’ 5-3 win at Crypto.com Arena on Saturday. “I thought we kind of left it all out there, played with good pace,” Hayton said.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Girls Water Polo: Bishop's Schools 10, Carlsbad 8
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- CIF Water Polo Open Division Title came down to the final minute with Bishop's Schools prevailing 10-8 to win the title. For Coach Doug Peabody its 33rd CIF Title that includes boys and girls.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: Booker, Durant and Beal help the Suns beat the Bulls to snap a 4-game losing streak
item.description: Devin Booker had 29 points and eight assists, Kevin Durant scored 27 points and Bradley Beal had 25 in his return to the starting lineup to help the Phoenix Suns beat the Chicago Bulls 121-117 on Saturday to end a four-game losing streak.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Thunder cruise past Jazz in first game after break
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Shai Gilgeous-Alexander scored 21 points and the West-leading Oklahoma City Thunder beat the Utah Jazz 130-107 on Friday night for their eighth victory in nine games. Chet Holmgren added 20 points for the Thunder.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Girls Soccer: Westview 3, Eastlake 1
item.description: Open Division girls soccer match between Westview and Eastlake to see who goes on to the next round of playoffs.
item.dc:creator: Allison Edmonds, Fox 5

item.title: One-armed basketball player makes history with basket
item.description: When her high school basketball coach cut her from the team senior year, Baileigh Sinaman-Daniel refused to let that rejection, or the fact she was born with one arm, end her dream.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Connor McDavid scores in OT to give Canada 3-2 win over United States in 4 Nations Face-Off final
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — When they played “O Canada” for the second time, there were no American fans left in the arena to boo.
item.dc:creator: JIMMY GOLEN, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Robot umpires are getting their first MLB test during spring training
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (AP) — A computerized system that calls balls and strikes is being tested during Major League Baseball spring training exhibition games starting Thursday after four years of experiments in the minor leagues.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Suspects charged in connection to burglaries of several pro athletes
item.description: Seven Chilean nationals face federal charges related to the burglaries of several high profile athletes' homes.
item.dc:creator: Brian Dulle, WGN 9
